ar.page_title: تعلم الإنجليزية بفعالية: مقاطع أفلام قصيرة مع Shadowing و Dictation
ar.page_description: حسّن مهارات الاستماع والنطق لديك من خلال ممارسة مقاطع الأفلام القصيرة بتقنيات Shadowing و Dictation. استمتع بتعلم اللغة الإنجليزية بطريقة ممتعة وفعالة. ابدأ مجاناً الآن!

de.page_title: Englisch lernen mit Filmclips: Shadowing & Diktat für flüssiges Sprechen
de.page_description: Verbessern Sie Hörverstehen und Aussprache mit unseren kurzen Filmclips, Shadowing & Diktat-Übungen. Lernen Sie Englisch unterhaltsam und effektiv. Jetzt kostenlos testen!

el.page_title: Μάθετε Αγγλικά με Σύντομα Κλιπ Ταινιών: Shadowing & Υπαγόρευση
el.page_description: Βελτιώστε την ακρόαση και την προφορά σας με σύντομα κλιπ ταινιών χρησιμοποιώντας Shadowing & Υπαγόρευση. Απολαύστε την εκμάθηση Αγγλικών με διασκεδαστικό και αποτελεσματικό τρόπο. Δοκιμάστε δωρεάν τώρα!

en.page_title: Learn English with Movie Clips: Shadowing & Dictation Practice
en.page_description: Master listening and speaking with short movie clips using our Shadowing & Dictation method. Enjoy learning English in a fun and effective way. Start practicing for free now!

es.page_title: Aprende Inglés con Clips de Películas: Práctica con Shadowing y Dictado
es.page_description: Mejora tu comprensión auditiva y pronunciación con nuestros clips de películas cortos y ejercicios de Shadowing y Dictado. Disfruta aprendiendo inglés de forma divertida y efectiva. ¡Empieza gratis ahora!

id.page_title: Belajar Bahasa Inggris dari Cuplikan Film: Shadowing & Dikte Efektif
id.page_description: Tingkatkan kemampuan mendengarkan dan berbicara Anda dengan cuplikan film pendek, Shadowing, dan Dikte. Nikmati belajar bahasa Inggris dengan cara yang menyenangkan dan efektif. Coba gratis sekarang!

ja.page_title: 映画のショートクリップで英語学習：シャドーイング＆ディクテーション
ja.page_description: ショート映画クリップとシャドーイング・ディクテーションでリスニング力とスピーキング力を向上。楽しく効果的に英語を学びましょう。今すぐ無料でお試しください！

ko.page_title: 영화 짧은 클립으로 영어 학습: 섀도잉 및 딕테이션 연습
ko.page_description: 영화 짧은 클립을 활용한 섀도잉 및 딕테이션으로 듣기 및 말하기 실력을 향상시키세요. 재미있고 효과적으로 영어를 배우세요. 지금 무료로 시작해보세요!

ms.page_title: Belajar Bahasa Inggeris dengan Klip Filem Pendek: Shadowing & Imlaan
ms.page_description: Tingkatkan kemahiran mendengar dan bertutur anda dengan klip filem pendek menggunakan kaedah Shadowing & Imlaan kami. Nikmati pembelajaran Bahasa Inggeris dengan cara yang menyeronokkan dan berkesan. Cuba secara percuma sekarang!

pt.page_title: Aprenda Inglês com Clipes de Filmes: Prática de Shadowing & Ditado
pt.page_description: Melhore sua compreensão auditiva e pronúncia com nossos clipes de filmes curtos, Shadowing e Ditado. Desfrute de aprender inglês de forma divertida e eficaz. Experimente de graça agora!

ru.page_title: Изучайте английский с помощью коротких видео: Shadowing и диктанты
ru.page_description: Улучшите навыки аудирования и произношения с помощью коротких видеоклипов, Shadowing и диктантов. Наслаждайтесь изучением английского в увлекательной и эффективной форме. Попробуйте бесплатно прямо сейчас!

th.page_title: เรียนภาษาอังกฤษจากคลิปหนัง: เทคนิค Shadowing และ Dictation
th.page_description: พัฒนาทักษะการฟังและการพูดของคุณด้วยคลิปหนังสั้น พร้อมฝึก Shadowing และ Dictation เรียนภาษาอังกฤษอย่างสนุกและมีประสิทธิภาพ ลองใช้ฟรีทันที!

tr.page_title: Kısa Film Klipleriyle İngilizce Öğrenin: Shadowing ve Dikte Uygulamaları
tr.page_description: Kısa film klipleri, Shadowing ve Dikte ile dinleme ve konuşma becerilerinizi geliştirin. İngilizce öğrenmenin keyfini eğlenceli ve etkili bir şekilde çıkarın. Şimdi ücretsiz deneyin!

uk.page_title: Вивчайте англійську за допомогою коротких відео: Shadowing та диктанти
uk.page_description: Покращуйте навички аудіювання та вимови за допомогою коротких відеокліпів, Shadowing та диктантів. Насолоджуйтесь вивченням англійської в захопливій та ефективній формі. Спробуйте безкоштовно зараз!

vi.page_title: Học Tiếng Anh Qua Phim Ngắn: Shadowing & Nghe Chép Chính Tả
vi.page_description: Cải thiện kỹ năng nghe và nói với các đoạn phim ngắn, luyện tập Shadowing và Nghe chép chính tả. Học tiếng Anh thú vị và hiệu quả. Bắt đầu luyện tập miễn phí ngay!

zh-CN.page_title: 用电影短片学英语：影子跟读与听写练习
zh-CN.page_description: 通过电影短片、影子跟读(Shadowing)和听写(Dictation)练习，提高您的听力和口语技能。享受有趣且高效的英语学习方式。立即免费开始！

zh-TW.page_title: 用電影短片學英文：影子跟讀與聽寫練習
zh-TW.page_description: 透過電影短片、影子跟讀(Shadowing)和聽寫(Dictation)練習，提高您的聽力和口語技能。享受有趣且高效的英文學習方式。立即免費開始！

meta.page_title: Learn English with Movie Clips: Shadowing & Dictation Practice
meta.page_description: Master listening and speaking with short movie clips using our Shadowing & Dictation method. Enjoy learning English in a fun and effective way. Start practicing for free now!

no_rank.title: No Rank
no_rank.description: Complete 50 sentences to unlock your level and start your learning journey.
no_rank.description_shadowing: Practice 30 sentences to unlock your shadowing level and begin your learning journey.

beginner.title: Beginner
beginner.description: Learners can understand familiar simple words and phrases. They need to listen repeatedly and often make mistakes when transcribing short sentences.
beginner.description_shadowing: Learners can repeat basic words and phrases but often struggle with pronunciation and timing. They need multiple listens and speak slowly.

elementary.title: Elementary
elementary.description: Learners understand simple, slow, and clear sentences on familiar topics. They can transcribe most of the content after a few listens.
elementary.description_shadowing: Learners can repeat simple sentences with clearer pronunciation. They may still pause or mispronounce unfamiliar words.

intermediate.title: Intermediate
intermediate.description: Learners can understand the main points in clearly spoken passages on common situations. They rarely need to replay and make noticeably fewer mistakes.
intermediate.description_shadowing: Learners can follow and repeat common phrases with moderate fluency. They mostly keep pace with the speaker but may lack natural intonation.

upper_intermediate.title: Upper Intermediate
upper_intermediate.description: Learners understand conversations, interviews, and news clearly with few mistakes. They can transcribe almost accurately after 1–2 listens.
upper_intermediate.description_shadowing: Learners can shadow natural-speed conversations with good fluency and rhythm. They make few mistakes and sound more confident.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Learners understand complex speech, even with unfamiliar language. They can transcribe nearly perfectly after one listen.
advanced.description_shadowing: Learners can repeat complex sentences accurately with proper intonation and near-native fluency. They can shadow most content in real time.

proficient.title: Proficient
proficient.description: Learners fully understand and accurately transcribe complex content, including implications, nuances, and metaphors. Their skill is native-like.
proficient.description_shadowing: Learners can perfectly shadow native speakers in real time, with accurate pronunciation, rhythm, and emotion. Their speech is native-like.

reviews.title: What Our Users Say
reviews.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied learners who have improved their English pronunciation and listening skills with our dictation and shadowing approach.

1.title: Exactly what I was looking for!
1.content: This app provides the best functionality that I was looking for. I really appreciate the builders of this app. It truly helps improve my English skills.

2.title: Amazing app, very interesting lessons!
2.content: This app is amazing, the lessons are really interesting!

3.title: The best English app I've ever tried
3.content: This is the first app where I actively went to the reviews section. I've tried many English apps but this one satisfies me the most. It trains both listening and speaking. Lessons are organized by level, making it easy to find the right fit. They're short and engaging — one lesson a day doesn't take much time. The pronunciation recognition doesn't feel frustrating like some other apps. The interface is user-friendly, clean, and easy to use. And best of all, it's completely free. Absolutely wonderful. Thank you so much to the team behind this app!

4.title: Easy shadowing practice, completely free!
4.content: It's really very easy for practice shadowing and it's completely free. I enjoyed it!

5.title: Free app for all listening levels
5.content: Free app with diverse exercises that help improve listening skills at all levels.

6.title: Will recommend to all my friends!
6.content: I will suggest my friends to use it for improving English skills.
